TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bsuring Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Bsuring a niyaro', 321 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,054 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,008 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 46 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku 82%, Tayal 3%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Seediq1%, roma 5%.
S.PHON: b~b~vso~u~uriŇč itiniaj i xio~u~u…ĺin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u b~b~vso~u~uriŇč a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u **%, taja…ĺ *%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Bsuring Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Bsuring a niyaro', 321 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,054 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,008 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 46 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku 82%, Tayal 3%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Seediq1%, roma 5%.
S.PHON: b~b~vso~u~uriŇč itiniaj i xio~u~u…ĺin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u b~b~vso~u~uriŇč a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u **%, taja…ĺ *%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, ro~uma *%.
